title: Rainbow comet

{{Quote|In the twelve years that I have ricocheted around this galaxy like the legendary Roon Comet, I have encountered a great many interesting personalities.|I-5YQ|<ref name="MedStar1">''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]''</ref>}}
The '''rainbow comets''' of the [[Cloak of the Sith/Legends|Cloak of the Sith]] [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] were for centuries the only method for finding safe passage to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Roon/Legends|Roon]]. Annually, the comet would find its path through the hazardous spaceway on its way to briefly orbit [[Roon system/Legends|the system's]] sun. It moved in a way that resembled a ricochet.<ref name="MedStar1" />

In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' to [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]].</ref> the [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] [[I-5YQ]] compared [[Gender/Legends|his]] travels throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to the motion of the Roon Comet, which by that [[Time/Legends|time]] had become legendary.<ref name="MedStar1" />

Explorer [[Mungo Baobab]] gained much notoriety from following the comet as a means of rediscovering the [[Manda-Roon Merchant Route]]. Following this brave pioneering effort, a series of [[lightstation]]s were put in place to guide future merchants and visitors.
